ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: AlterSend uses your camera to scan connection QR codes.
ios.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: AlterSend uses your local network to discover nearby devices for peer-to-peer file transfer.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AlterSend reads your photo library so you can pick photos and videos to send to another device.
ios.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: AlterSend saves received images and videos to your photo library.
